functions.title: Guide Book #92
functions.author: Forsaken Odyssey
pages:
§7Guide Book #92§r
§lPiglin Chief§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Uncommon
•§lBehavior§r: Hostile
•§lMob type§r: Spellcaster, Piglin, Humanoid, Monster, Boss.
•§lSpawns in§r: Piglin's Dungeon
•§lHealth§r: 400

•§lKnockback resistance§r: 0.6
•§lWalk speed§r: 0.25
•§lBreathes in§r: Air
•§lPossible drops§r: Stone Piglin Chief Trophy, Piglin War Hammer, Piglin Fire Staff, Netherite Scrap, Gold Nugget, XP Orbs.
•§lAvoids§r: Nether Soul Wisp,

Soul Fire Bird, Soul Lanterns, Soul Fire.
•§lAggressive toward§r: Player, Wither, Wither Skeleton, Iron Golem, Snow Golem, Trader, Villager, Player's aggressive tamed mobs.
•§lEquipped weapon§r: Piglin War Hammer, Piglin Fire Staff.

•§lRange attack§r: Fire Spike Magic Missile
•§lProjectile damage§r: 7
•§lProjectile effect§r: Flame
•Can inflict a §lWeakness effect§r toward its nearest enemies.
•Can broadcast their enemies to the nearby Piglins.
